# برمها — Barmha

> أكبر موقع إعلانات مبوبة في سوريا | Syria's largest classified ads platform

Barmha (barmha.com) is a bilingual (Arabic/English) online marketplace serving Syria. Users can post and browse listings across real estate, vehicles, jobs, services, and general classifieds. The platform supports buyer–seller contact via WhatsApp and in-app messaging, map-based search, saved searches, area alerts, and reviews.

## Sections

- [Properties](/properties) — residential and commercial real estate for sale or rent (apartments, villas, land, offices, shops)
- [Vehicles](/vehicles) — cars, trucks, motorcycles, and spare parts for sale
- [Classifieds](/classifieds) — general second-hand and new items
- [Jobs](/jobs) — employment listings across all industries
- [Services](/services) — freelance and professional services
- [Deals](/deals) — merchant offers and discounts
- [Events](/events) — local events and activities
- [News](/news) — local news articles

## Features

- Bilingual UI: Arabic (RTL) and English (LTR)
- Map search with geographic bounding box and polygon drawing
- Area alerts: notify users when new listings appear in a drawn zone
- Saved searches with email/push notifications
- In-app messaging between buyers and sellers
- Listing ratings and seller reviews
- Google Sign-In and Facebook Login
- PWA — installable on iOS and Android

## Contact & Legal

- Website: https://barmha.com
- Contact: https://barmha.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://barmha.com/legal/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://barmha.com/legal/terms
- Sitemap: https://barmha.com/sitemap.xml
